name: North Carolina State Board of Refrigeration Contractors Verify License Search

agency.name: North Carolina State Board of Refrigeration Contractors

termsReviewNotes: Official board and ARL Systems public-search pages were reviewed; no source-specific reuse terms page was confirmed in this phase.
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official public search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: North Carolina commercial refrigeration contractor licenses
North Carolina industrial refrigeration contractor licenses
North Carolina service refrigeration contractor licenses
North Carolina transport refrigeration contractor licenses
knownExclusions: This source is scoped to refrigeration contractor licenses regulated by the North Carolina State Board of Refrigeration Contractors.
Heating, plumbing, fire sprinkler, electrical, general contractor, local permit, and municipal registration records are outside this source entry.
The official source is lookup-oriented; no stable machine-readable bulk export has been confirmed for OpenTrade ingestion.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should respect the public-search workflow and prefer official bulk options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official refrigeration-contractor lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that an authorization, local permit, or other credential does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official refrigeration-board bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for North Carolina refrigeration contractor verification. The public search exposes commercial, industrial, service, and transport refrigeration classifications, but OpenTrade does not automate it without a separate access-control and terms review.
maintainerNotes: Keep this source separate from the plumbing/heating/fire-sprinkler board because the refrigeration board regulates distinct refrigeration contractor classifications.

researchEvidence.note: Official public verify-license search reviewed; it lists commercial, industrial, service, and transport refrigeration contractor classification types.
Official board site reviewed; public access presented a request-verification page during command-line review, so automation remains unsupported.

blocker.summary: An official lookup exists, but no stable, documented machine-readable source has been adapter-reviewed with offline fixtures.
